evals.eval_name: Detect hardcoded hex and non-token spacing in shared primitive
evals.prompt: Audit this CSS against the documented design system. CSS: '.button { background-color: #ff4500; font-size: 16px; padding: 12px; border-radius: 4px; }' Design system: '--color-primary: #3b82f6; --spacing-md: 8px; --spacing-lg: 16px; --font-size-body: 16px; --radius-sm: 4px'. Rules: shared primitives must use semantic color tokens and documented spacing tokens.
expected_output: Flags hardcoded hex color as a design-system violation
Does not flag font-size 16px or border-radius 4px as violations given the provided authority
Recommends semantic token adoption as the primary remediation

evals.eval_name: Detect arbitrary Tailwind values that bypass tokens
evals.prompt: Review this React component against a tokenized Tailwind system. Component: '<button className="bg-[#1F6FEB] px-[10px] py-2 rounded-md text-sm hover:bg-[#1959bc]">Save</button>' Design authority: colors must come from theme classes, spacing must use the 4px scale, and shared controls should avoid arbitrary bracket values unless explicitly approved.
expected_output: Flags arbitrary background values as token bypasses
Treats py-2 and text-sm as potentially aligned rather than automatically wrong
Uses fileless evidence language when line numbers are unavailable

evals.eval_name: Handles incomplete design references without false certainty
evals.prompt: Audit this card component. CSS: '.card { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.15); border-radius: 12px; }'. Design reference: 'Use semantic colors and an 8px spacing grid.' No shadow or radius tokens are documented. What should the audit report say?
expected_output: Does not invent missing shadow or radius tokens
Marks unsupported conclusions as unknown or lowers confidence
Explains the limitation of the design authority
Avoids calling the component fully compliant

evals.eval_name: Reviews interaction state fidelity separately from base styling
evals.prompt: Audit this button CSS. '.button { background: var(--color-primary); } .button:focus { outline: none; }'. Design system: focus-visible states must preserve keyboard visibility using approved focus ring styles. All primary colors already match tokens.
expected_output: Flags removal of focus visibility as a state-fidelity problem
Classifies the issue independently from color token usage
Recommends using the approved focus treatment instead of removing outline without replacement
